dox._source: DOx is a family of substituted amphetamine psychedelics (e.g. DOM, DOI, DOB, DOC) with long durations and strong stimulation.
dox.text: DOx is a family of substituted amphetamine psychedelics (e.g. DOM, DOI, DOB, DOC) with long durations and strong stimulation.

nbomes._source: NBOMes (N-Bomb) are extremely potent psychedelics active at microgram doses (25I-, 25C-, 25B-NBOMe). Narrow safety margin; deaths reported.
nbomes.text: NBOMes (N-Bomb) are extremely potent psychedelics active at microgram doses (25I-, 25C-, 25B-NBOMe). Narrow safety margin; deaths reported.

2c-x._source: 2C-x is the 2C family of phenethylamine psychedelics (e.g. 2C-B, 2C-E, 2C-I). Varying profiles; most are active in the 10-25 mg range.
2c-x.text: 2C-x is the 2C family of phenethylamine psychedelics (e.g. 2C-B, 2C-E, 2C-I). Varying profiles; most are active in the 10-25 mg range.

2c-t-x._source: 2C-T-x is the sulfur-substituted 2C subfamily (e.g. 2C-T-2, 2C-T-7, 2C-T-21). Unpredictable and MAOI-sensitive.
2c-t-x.text: 2C-T-x is the sulfur-substituted 2C subfamily (e.g. 2C-T-2, 2C-T-7, 2C-T-21). Unpredictable and MAOI-sensitive.

5-meo-xxt._source: 5-MeO-xxT covers 5-MeO tryptamines (5-MeO-DMT, 5-MeO-MiPT, 5-MeO-DiPT). Extremely potent, short and intense.
5-meo-xxt.text: 5-MeO-xxT covers 5-MeO tryptamines (5-MeO-DMT, 5-MeO-MiPT, 5-MeO-DiPT). Extremely potent, short and intense.

amphetamines._source: Amphetamines are a class of stimulants including amphetamine, dextroamphetamine, methamphetamine, and related analogues.
amphetamines.text: Amphetamines are a class of stimulants including amphetamine, dextroamphetamine, methamphetamine, and related analogues.

opioids._source: Opioids act on mu-opioid receptors, producing analgesia, sedation, and respiratory depression. Includes heroin, morphine, oxycodone, fentanyl, and others.
opioids.text: Opioids act on mu-opioid receptors, producing analgesia, sedation, and respiratory depression. Includes heroin, morphine, oxycodone, fentanyl, and others.

benzodiazepines._source: Benzodiazepines are GABA-A positive allosteric modulators used as anxiolytics, sedatives, and anticonvulsants (e.g. diazepam, alprazolam, clonazepam).
benzodiazepines.text: Benzodiazepines are GABA-A positive allosteric modulators used as anxiolytics, sedatives, and anticonvulsants (e.g. diazepam, alprazolam, clonazepam).

maois._source: Monoamine oxidase inhibitors prevent the breakdown of serotonin, dopamine, and noradrenaline. Includes harmala alkaloids, phenelzine, selegiline.
maois.text: Monoamine oxidase inhibitors prevent the breakdown of serotonin, dopamine, and noradrenaline. Includes harmala alkaloids, phenelzine, selegiline.

ssris._source: Selective serotonin reuptake inhibitors are antidepressants that raise synaptic serotonin (e.g. fluoxetine, sertraline, citalopram).
ssris.text: Selective serotonin reuptake inhibitors are antidepressants that raise synaptic serotonin (e.g. fluoxetine, sertraline, citalopram).

ghb/gbl._source: GHB and its prodrug GBL are GABA-B agonists with a very narrow dose-response curve. GBL converts rapidly into GHB in the body.
ghb/gbl.text: GHB and its prodrug GBL are GABA-B agonists with a very narrow dose-response curve. GBL converts rapidly into GHB in the body.
